Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

�新 New listing (published June 12, 2026)

Content

We are holding a parenting lecture.

By understanding how children develop, you will deepen your joy in spending time with your child. Why not learn together with others?

Date and time

July 18 (Saturday), 10:00 a.m. – 12:00 p.m.

Location

Child Development and Support Center (19-4 Yamate-cho)

View larger map (opens Google Maps)

Instructor

Akira Ogawa (Professor, Faculty of Developmental Education, Uekusa Gakuen University)

Who can participate

Parents raising children, grandparents, and anyone interested in child support

(Must live, work, or study in Hanno City)

Capacity

30 people (first come, first served)

Fee

Free

How to apply

Contact the Child Development and Support Center by Monday, July 13

Phone: 042-978-8415

Fax: 042-978-8849

Email: kosodate@city.hanno.lg.jp

Childcare for preschool children is available. Please let us know when you apply.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kodomoshienbu/kodomoshienka/kosodatesogocenter/7857.html
summary: ℹ️ Parenting lecture: "What is attachment? How to create a safe base for your child" (reservation required)
